entries.topic: MQL detection sketches and actionable threat hunting logic
entries.note: OAuth redirect abuse hunt was particularly interesting and super relevant to work — this style of content (concrete detection logic, MQL sketches, customer-vertical callouts) is exactly what lands

entries.topic: Novel email evasion techniques targeting detection infrastructure (NLP, ML-based filters)
entries.note: NLP padding evasion was super relevant — techniques that specifically target detection systems (NLP classifiers, AI-based filters) are high-signal for a detection engineer

entries.topic: State-sponsored APT activity targeting high-value individuals (HVTs)
entries.note: Customer base is commercial (retail, education, law, real estate, AI companies, SaaS/consumer products) — not impacted by nation-state HVT targeting. Include APT/state-sponsored content ONLY if TTPs or infrastructure have demonstrably trickled down to commercial-sector targets, e.g. Kimsuky QR code techniques being adopted by commodity actors, or RIS infrastructure overlapping with BEC campaigns

preferred_topics: MQL detection sketches and concrete detection logic
actionable threat hunting with customer-vertical callouts
novel evasion techniques targeting NLP or ML-based email filters
email threats relevant to commercial-sector customers (retail, education, law, real estate, AI companies, SaaS)
avoid_topics: state-sponsored APT activity targeting high-value individuals (government, military, journalists) — skip unless TTPs have clearly proliferated to commercial-sector campaigns
